def negative_exception_handler_branches_on_error_message_string():
    rule_id = "exception_handler_branches_on_error_message_string"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Exception handler inspects str(e) or e.message in a condition instead of matching on exception type."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
